Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model

Class Ech0196Payment

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model.Ech0196Payment
public class Ech0196Payment extends Object
Payment/income entry (Ertrag) for a security in the eCH-0196 tax statement.
